title: tylophora asthmatica
intro: Tylophora asthmatica, also known as Asperula asthmatica or Tylophora indica, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, native to tropical regions of Asia and known for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Tylophora asthmatica include reducing inflammation, relieving cough and congestion, and improving lung function. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat respiratory conditions.
